name: Dheonix
description: A dheonix is the demonic counterpart of the phoenix, often portrayed as a harbinger of the end times — a massive bird-shaped demon wreathed in dark flames. This enormous creature is notoriously difficult to kill, able to reform within the fires it creates. Its wingspan blots out the sun and its shriek heralds destruction.
tactics: The dheonix fights primarily from the air, using its flight speed to stay out of melee range. It opens by scattering dheonix fires across the battlefield with Firebolt and Dheonix Fire, then pulses them with Dark Pulse to suppress the party. When cornered or badly damaged, it detonates with Font of Flames to reform at a dheonix fire and reset the fight. It uses Noxious Smoke to punish any creature that tries to land a decisive blow. The party must recognize that extinguishing all dheonix fires before the dheonix is killed — or immediately when it dies — is the only path to permanent victory.

actions.name: Talon Rake
actions.description: The dheonix swoops past a creature, raking them with its massive talons for physical damage. The dheonix does not provoke reactions to creatures who take damage from this attack.

actions.name: Firebolt
actions.description: The dheonix hurls a projectile of dark flame at a creature, dealing heat damage. Any flammable surface struck by this attack ignites.

actions.name: Dheonix Fire
actions.description: The dheonix targets a flame within moderate (20 unit) range and converts it to dheonix fire. This fire burns with a purple fire, absorbing all light around it and dealing 5 dark damage to anyone who starts their turn within a nearby (1 unit) radius. Dheonix fire cannot be extinguished by non-magical means and burns while the dheonix is alive.

actions.name: Dark Pulse
actions.description: The dheonix targets itself or a dheonix fire within moderate (20 unit) range, causing it to pulse with dark energy in a very short (5 unit) radius. All creatures in the area must make a resilience check of 7 or higher or take 8 dark damage.

actions.name: Font of Flames
actions.description: The dheonix detonates itself in a catastrophic explosion of fire and dark energy, striking all creatures within a short (10 unit) radius. The dheonix is destroyed by this action. All flames created or hit by the explosion are automatically converted to dheonix fires.

traits.name: Dark Rebirth
traits.description: As long as at least one dheonix fire exists, the dheonix cannot be permanently destroyed. At the start of the round after being destroyed, the dheonix reforms 4 units above one of its dheonix fires with 30 health. If all dheonix fires are extinguished before the dheonix reforms, it is destroyed permanently.
